---
title: ""
---

## Celebrities

-   During my time at UCLA I've been lucky enough to meet a lot of basketball players and a few other celebrities! My work with the SF Unicorns has also led to various interactions with international cricket players. Take a look at the photo gallery to see who I've met

::: {style="text-align: center;"}
[Open Gallery](celebrities.html){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
:::

## SF Unicorns

::: {.unicorn-links}
<div class="unicorn-link-item">
  <a class="unicorn-card" href="https://www.sfunicorns.com/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="Visit the San Francisco Unicorns website">
    <img class="unicorn-card-image" src="Images_and_Attachments/SF_Unicorns/sf_unicorns_logo.png" alt="San Francisco Unicorns logo">
  </a>
  <p>SF Unicorns Team Page</p>
</div>

<div class="unicorn-link-item">
  <a class="unicorn-card" href="https://www.cricexec.com/ai-has-arrived-in-cricket-the-san-francisco-unicorns-built-the-proof-then-made-it-public/689575481/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="Read AI Has Arrived in Cricket">
    <img class="unicorn-card-image" src="Images_and_Attachments/SF_Unicorns/cricexec-logo.png" alt="Cricexec logo">
  </a>
  <p>The Future of Cricket Analytics</p>
</div>
:::
